mnemonics: Morgan KAUF-mann KAUFfers (buys) great CLOUD books for computing
keyPoints: Morgan Kaufmann is a major academic publisher specializing in computer science and engineering books
They publish foundational texts used in cloud computing courses
Their publications are often considered authoritative sources in the field
commonMistakes: Confusing Morgan Kaufmann with other publishers like Pearson or McGraw-Hill
Not recognizing it as a reputable academic source rather than a general publisher
